args.command: cd /workspace/DreamServer && git fetch origin pull/*/head 2>&1 | head -50
cd /workspace/DreamServer && git ls-remote --heads origin | grep -E "pull" | head -20

cd /workspace/DreamServer && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls?state=open&per_page=100" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Total open PRs: {len(data)}'); [print(f\"PR #{p['number']}: {p['title']} ({p['user']['login']})\") for p in data[:20]]"

cd /workspace/DreamServer && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls?state=open&per_page=100" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f\"PR #{p['number']}: {p['title']} ({p['user']['login']})\") for p in data]"

cd /workspace/DreamServer && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls?state=open&per_page=100" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f\"PR #{p['number']}: {p['user']['login']} - {p['title']}\") for p in data]" > /workspace/pr-list.txt && wc -l /workspace/pr-list.txt

cd /workspace/DreamServer && for pr in 1057 1056 1055 1054 1053 1052 1051 1050 1049 1048 1047 1046 1045 1044 1043 1042 1040 1039 1038 1037; do curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls/$pr" | python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f\"PR #{p['number']}: {p['title']} (by {p['user']['login']}, labels: {[l['name'] for l in p['labels']]})\")"; done

cd /workspace/DreamServer && for pr in 1036 1035 1034 1033 1032 1030 1029 1028 1027 1026 1025 1024 1023 1022 1021 1020 1019 1018 1017 1016; do curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls/$pr" | python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f\"PR #{p['number']}: {p['title']} (by {p['user']['login']}, labels: {[l['name'] for l in p['labels']]})\")"; done

cd /workspace/DreamServer && for pr in 1015 1014 1013 1012 1011 1010 1009 1008 1007 1006 1005 1004 1003 1002 1000 999 998 997 996 994; do curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls/$pr" | python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f\"PR #{p['number']}: {p['title']} (by {p['user']['login']}, labels: {[l['name'] for l in p['labels']]})\")"; done

cd /workspace/DreamServer && for pr in 997 996 994 993 992 991 990 988 983 974 973 966 961 959 750 716 364 351; do curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls/$pr" | python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f\"PR #{p['number']}: {p['title']} (by {p['user']['login']}, labels: {[l['name'] for l in p['labels']]})\")"; done

cd /workspace/DreamServer && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls?state=open&per_page=100" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps([{'number':p['number'],'title':p['title'],'user':p['user']['login'],'labels':[l['name'] for l in p['labels']]} for p in data], indent=2))" > /workspace/pr-details.json && head -100 /workspace/pr-details.json

cd /workspace/DreamServer && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls?state=open&per_page=100" > /workspace/prs-api.json && python3 -c "import json; data=json.load(open('/workspace/prs-api.json')); print(type(data)); print(len(data) if isinstance(data, list) else 'not a list')"

cd /workspace/DreamServer && sleep 60 && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls?state=open&per_page=100" > /workspace/prs-api2.json && python3 -c "import json; data=json.load(open('/workspace/prs-api2.json')); print(type(data)); print(len(data) if isinstance(data, list) else 'not a list')"
cd /workspace/DreamServer && git fetch origin pull/1057/head:pr-1057 2>&1 | head -20
cd /workspace/DreamServer && for pr in 1056 1055 1054 1053 1052 1051 1050 1049 1048 1047 1046 1045 1044 1043 1042 1040 1039 1038 1037; do git fetch origin pull/$pr/head:pr-$pr 2>&1; done
cd /workspace/DreamServer && for pr in 1015 1014 1013 1012 1011 1010 1009 1008 1007 1006 1005 1004 1003 1002 1000 999 998 997 996 994; do git fetch origin pull/$pr/head:pr-$pr 2>&1; done
cd /workspace/DreamServer && for pr in 993 992 991 990 988 983 974 973 966 961 959 750 716 364 351; do git fetch origin pull/$pr/head:pr-$pr 2>&1; done
cd /workspace && git init audit-repo && cd audit-repo && git remote add origin https://github.com/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer.git && git fetch origin 2>&1 | head -20
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git fetch origin pull/*/head 2>&1 | head -20
cd /workspace/audit-repo && for pr in $(seq 351 20 1057); do echo "Fetching PR $pr"; git fetch origin pull/$pr/head:pr-$pr 2>&1; done
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git show-ref | grep "pr-" | cut -d'/' -f3 | sort -n
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git show-ref | grep "pr-" | cut -d'/' -f3 | sort -n | uniq
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git show-ref | grep "pr-" | cut -d'/' -f3 | sort -n | uniq | wc -l
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git show-ref | grep "pr-" | cut -d'/' -f3 | sort -n | uniq | head -80
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git show-ref | grep "pr-" | cut -d'/' -f3 | sort -n | uniq | tail -30
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git show-ref | grep "pr-" | cut -d'/' -f3 | sort -n | uniq > /workspace/pr-list-audit.txt && cat /workspace/pr-list-audit.txt | wc -l
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git show-ref | grep "pr-" | cut -d'/' -f3 | sort -n | uniq | grep -E "^[0-9]+$" | head -20
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git show-ref | grep "pr-" | cut -d'/' -f3 | sed 's/pr-//' | sort -n | uniq | head -20
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git show-ref | grep "pr-" | cut -d'/' -f3 | sed 's/pr-//' | sort -n | uniq | tail -20
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git show-ref | grep "pr-" | cut -d'/' -f3 | sed 's/pr-//' | sort -n | uniq > /workspace/pr-numbers.txt && cat /workspace/pr-numbers.txt

cd /workspace && python3 -c "
import subprocess
result = subprocess.run(['git', 'show-ref'], capture_output=True, text=True, cwd='/workspace/audit-repo')
pr_refs = [line.split()[1] for line in result.stdout.split('\n') if 'pr-' in line]
pr_nums = sorted(set([line.split('/')[-1].replace('pr-', '') for line in pr_refs]))
print(f'Total PR refs: {len(pr_refs)}')
print(f'Unique PR numbers: {len(pr_nums)}')
print(f'PR numbers: {pr_nums}')
"
cd /workspace/audit-repo && git branch -m main-detached && git checkout -b main origin/main 2>&1 | head -10
